title: publisher-oci plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the publisher-oci semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_REF.description: OCI reference template to publish artifacts to (e.g. "ghcr.io/org/app:{version}"). Required.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS.description: Comma-separated list of artifact file paths to attach to the OCI reference.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_JSON.description: JSON array of artifact file paths to attach. Alternative to SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACT.description: Single artifact file path to attach. Alternative to SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS / SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_JSON.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
